thinking:
**Analyzing the input**

I'm currently focused on the `CompanyDashboard.tsx` file, specifically the "proposed salary" input field. I'm reviewing the implementation of the value attribute. I'm looking at how it's being handled and updated, especially the "Valor Médio" placeholder text. I want to understand how that field is working.


**Implementing Currency Formatting**

I've updated the `CompanyDashboard.tsx` file to incorporate currency formatting. I've modified the `bonusValue` input and the benefit value inputs (VT and VA) to utilize the `formatCurrency` function. This should give the user a formatted value. I've also verified that this is the only page where users provide currency values for the bonus/commission or the benefits package. I'm now checking what happens when the user selects a benefit.

args.Description: "Format the commission/reward value field using Brazilian currency format in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Update the bonus value input onChange handler to format the currency using formatCurrency."
args.ReplacementContent:
"                                    <input 
                                      type="text" 
                                      placeholder="Valor Médio"
                                      value={vacancyForm.bonusValue}
                                      onChange={(e) => setVacancyForm({...vacancyForm, bonusValue: formatCurrency(e.target.value)})}
                                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold outline-none focus:border-primary-300"
                                    />"
args.TargetContent:
"                                    <input 
                                      type="text" 
                                      placeholder="Valor Médio"
                                      value={vacancyForm.bonusValue}
                                      onChange={(e) => setVacancyForm({...vacancyForm, bonusValue: e.target.value})}
                                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold outline-none focus:border-primary-300"
                                    />"
args.toolAction: "Formatting proposed salary extra field in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
